title: Admin login
caption: The vbwd admin backoffice login page (http://localhost:8081/admin/login).

title: Signed in — dashboard
caption: Authenticated as admin@example.com. The admin dashboard loads with the full backoffice sidebar (Sales, Settings, CMS).

title: Import / Export view
caption: Settings → Import/Export. The General tab is manifest-driven: every registered entity (CMS, Sales, Settings clusters) can be exported or imported here. We will import the hotel booking catalogue — first categories, then resources.

title: Booking Categories: file selected
caption: The envelope booking_categories.json is selected in the unified Import block. Mode is upsert (match existing rows by slug). No data has been written yet.

title: Booking Categories: dry-run preview
caption: Clicking Preview runs a dry_run import — it validates and reports what would happen without writing. Result for booking_categories: created 5, updated 0, skipped 0, errors 0.

title: Booking Categories: import committed
caption: Clicking Confirm commits the import. Result for booking_categories: created 5, updated 0, skipped 0, errors 0. The rows are now persisted in the database.

title: Booking Resources: file selected
caption: The envelope booking_resources.json is selected in the unified Import block. Mode is upsert (match existing rows by slug). No data has been written yet.

title: Booking Resources: dry-run preview
caption: Clicking Preview runs a dry_run import — it validates and reports what would happen without writing. Result for booking_resources: created 15, updated 0, skipped 0, errors 0.

title: Booking Resources: import committed
caption: Clicking Confirm commits the import. Result for booking_resources: created 15, updated 0, skipped 0, errors 0. The rows are now persisted in the database.

title: Idempotent re-import (upsert by slug)
caption: Re-importing the same resources envelope in upsert mode matches the existing rows by slug: created 0, updated 15, errors 0. No duplicate rows are created — the import is idempotent and safe to re-run.

title: Verify: Booking dashboard counts
caption: The Booking admin dashboard reflects the import: 24 Resources (9 original + 15 imported) and 9 Categories (4 original + 5 hotel categories). The catalogue grew by exactly what we uploaded.

title: Verify: admin Resource List
caption: The Booking → Resources list now shows the imported hotel resources (Superior Deluxe, Deluxe Room Sea View, SPA Full Day, Conference Room A, Family Room, Meditation Session, …), each linked to its hotel category via category_slugs. The catalogue imported through the UI is fully operational — bookable, with availability and pricing intact.
